vocab.meaning: trải qua một sự biến đổi sâu sắc, toàn diện
vocab.example: The neighborhood has undergone a sea change, evolving from a neglected industrial zone into a vibrant tech hub.

vocab.meaning: khác xa so với cái gì đó trong quá khứ
vocab.example: The current state-of-the-art infrastructure is a far cry from the dilapidated buildings I remember as a child.

vocab.meaning: mọc lên như nấm (xuất hiện nhanh và nhiều)
vocab.example: High-rise apartment complexes have been springing up like mushrooms across the city skyline recently.

vocab.meaning: sự hối hả và nhộn nhịp (của cuộc sống đô thị)
vocab.example: What used to be a sleepy suburb is now defined by the hustle and bustle of a major commercial district.
Urbanization is occurring at a breakneck pace, with new facilities being completed almost every month.

vocab.meaning: mất đi cái hồn/bản sắc vốn có
vocab.example: Many elderly residents feel that with the arrival of global chains, the area has sadly started to lose its soul.

vocab.meaning: nhường chỗ cho (thường để xây dựng cái gì đó mới)
vocab.example: Historic landmarks were unfortunately torn down to make way for a massive shopping mall.
The transformation brought about world-class amenities that we could only have dreamed of a decade ago.

vocab.word: in the blink of an eye
vocab.meaning: trong nháy mắt (nhấn mạnh sự thay đổi quá nhanh)
vocab.example: It feels like the entire landscape of the district changed in the blink of an eye due to rapid investment.

vocab.meaning: một khu rừng bê tông (nơi chỉ có nhà cửa, thiếu cây xanh)
vocab.example: I’m concerned that the area is becoming a concrete jungle, with very few green spaces left for public recreation.
